entries.d:
Pertaining to, derived from, or containing, ethyl; as,
ethylic alcohol.

An unsymmetrical, divalent, hydrocarbon radical, C2H4
metameric with ethylene but written thus, CH3.CH to distinguish it from
the symmetrical ethylene, CH2.CH2. Its compounds are derived from
aldehyde. Formerly called also ethidene.
